scope: Test whether the strong-form Krein-MS bridge on the Paper 46 Appendix B enlarged substrate compresses like the K+-weak-form bridge did across Phase A.2'-A.4', or whether it's a genuine multi-month NCG-mathematics target.
verdict_summary: Q1'.A bimodal (Case A compresses but doesn't activate substantive content; Case B breaks Abelianness); Q1'.B four options of which best sprint-scale path (Option gamma operator-system replacement) is 6-10 weeks; Q1'.C on-orbit automatic, off-orbit gated on Q1'.B.

load_bearing_finding.name: Q1'.A topography enlargement is structurally bimodal

case_A.description: M=0 chirality-flip enlargement (analog of natural Krein topography Lemma 2.15 with chirality grading)
case_A.reason: W^{NL0} are spatial multiplication operators by Y^(3)_{NL0}; any two multiplication operators commute on the same Hilbert space
case_A.explanation: Decomposition O Case (iii) remains empty because modular flow preserves (N, L) labels; M=0 chirality-flip enlargement does not introduce new (N, L) labels

case_B.description: Full M-neq-0 chirality-flip enlargement (Paper 46 Appendix B eq. 1.41)
case_B.reason: W^{NLM} for M neq 0 carries non-trivial m_j structure; W^1 W^2 != W^2 W^1 in general; commutator reduces to spatial commutator [W^1, W^2] in each chirality sector
case_B.explanation: M-neq-0 introduces new (N, L, M) labels, activating Decomposition O Case (iii) (off-orbit triples not trivially -infinity)

Q1prime_A.task: Topography enlargement: extend M^L to include M^flip generators; verify topography axioms (Def 1.40-K)
Q1prime_A.case_B_status: BREAKS ABELIANNESS — cascades to Q1'.B structural workaround
Q1prime_A.load_bearing_question: Do chirality-flip generators commute with each other?
Q1prime_A.load_bearing_answer: YES in Case A (M=0 only); NO in Case B (full M)

Q1prime_B.task: Verify Gelfand spectrum of enlarged topography is well-defined
Q1prime_B.case_A_status: Gelfand spectrum well-defined as two-fold cover of underlying M-diagonal spectrum (chirality sheet labeling); 1-2 weeks
Q1prime_B.case_B_status: Abelianness breaks, four options: alpha (joint spectrum + cover), beta (twisted Gelfand), gamma (operator-system replacement), delta (genuine non-commutative MS)

alpha_joint_spectrum_cover.description: Joint spectrum of commuting subfamilies + covering structure

beta_twisted_gelfand.description: Twisted-Gelfand construction for self-adjoint operator subsystems (Effros-Ruan)

gamma_operator_system_replacement.description: Skip Gelfand; work directly at operator-system level (operator-system Lorentzian pre-length space, analog of Connes-vS 2021)

delta_non_commutative_MS.description: Build non-commutative MS pre-length space concept from scratch (named in Paper 48 §8.4 Q2')

Q1prime_C.task: Prove off-orbit super-additivity via Paper 42 four-witness theorem transport to off-axis modular flow
Q1prime_C.on_orbit_status: AUTOMATIC from Paper 42 (load-bearing input for Case (i) of Decomposition O)
Q1prime_C.off_orbit_status: Cascades from Q1'.B; three candidate approaches

a_direct_four_witness_via_cover.description: Lift four-witness theorem to a cover of the union of boost orbits
a_direct_four_witness_via_cover.gating: Requires Q1'.B Option alpha or gamma to close first
a_direct_four_witness_via_cover.effort_on_top: 2-4 weeks (sprint-scale IF Q1'.B closes via alpha/gamma)

b_modular_flow_composition.description: Compose Tomita-Takesaki modular flows across distinct KMS states

c_connes_rovelli_thermal_time_stack.description: Fibration of thermal-time hypothesis across orbit parameter space (twin-paradox dual)

Q1prime_effort_estimate.minimum_scenario: 3 months total IF Q1'.B closes via Option alpha or gamma (sprint-scale workarounds for non-Abelian extension)
Q1prime_effort_estimate.expected_scenario: 6 months IF Q1'.B forces Option beta or delta
Q1prime_effort_estimate.research_arc_scenario: 6-12 months IF Option delta (non-commutative MS) is the only resolution
Q1prime_effort_estimate.paper_48_8_1_estimate_text: Estimated effort: 3-6 months at sprint cadence; if Q1'.B forces non-commutative MS extension, timeline expands further (6-12 months)

Q1prime_Phase_1.scope: Close Case A (M=0 chirality-flip topography enlargement) at theorem-grade rigor
deliverables: Paper 48 §8.1 update naming Phase-1 as Q1'-Phase-1-Done
Q1prime_Phase_1.rationale: Establishes substantial chirality-graded machinery; honest stepping stone that does NOT exercise substantive Case (iii) content

Q1prime_Phase_2.scope: Close Q1' at strong-form via Option gamma (operator-system replacement)
deliverables: Strong-form bridge $W^{flip}_{full}$ extending to enlarged operator system
G-B2 closed at strict-strong-form via Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack (Q1'.C approach (c))
Paper 49 (math.OA) draft as 11th GeoVac series paper
Q1prime_Phase_2.conditional: IF agent decides to pursue non-Abelian extension

Q1prime_Phase_3.scope: Build non-commutative MS pre-length-space concept from scratch (Option delta)
deliverables: Non-commutative MS pre-length-space concept (new NCG framework)
Q1prime_Phase_3.scale: Multi-month NCG-research arc, comparable to Latremoliere propinquity development
Q1prime_Phase_3.conditional: Only if Q1'-Phase-2 deemed insufficient or if MS-categorical framework is required

R3_status_at_strong_form.strong_form_status: R3 continues to work for on-orbit content (Case (i) Decomposition O, automatic from Paper 42); off-orbit content (Case (iii)) requires Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack across distinct KMS states — a fibration generalization not in the literature

diagnostic_findings_beyond_Paper_48_8_1: Q1'.A Case A vs Case B bifurcation made structurally explicit
Case A would be a misleading-positive sprint result (preserves Abelianness but does not activate Decomposition O Case (iii))
Case B is the only sub-case that exercises substantive strong-form content but forces non-Abelianness
Q1'.C on-orbit content automatic from Paper 42; off-orbit content is the substantive new ingredient
R3 at strong-form requires Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack (fibration), not drop-in K+-weak-form R3

verdict_calibration.POSITIVE_COMPRESSES_reason: Q1'.A is bimodal; Case A compresses but doesn't activate substantive content; Case B breaks Abelianness
verdict_calibration.NEGATIVE_multi_month_reason: Substantive Q1' is genuinely multi-month at best-case (6-10 weeks Option gamma); Option delta is 6-12 month NCG-research target
verdict_calibration.PARTIAL_WITH_NAMED_OBSTRUCTIONS_reason: Q1'-Phase-1 (Case A) compresses to sprint scale and establishes substantial machinery; Q1'-Phase-2 (Case B + Option gamma) is multi-month follow-on; staged structure is the right organization

external: Mondino-Samann arXiv:2504.10380 v4 (pointed Lorentzian Gromov-Hausdorff convergence)
Connes-vS 2021 operator systems framework (Comm. Math. Phys. 383)
